description: Task definitions for RQ2: Task-Based Evaluation of structural summaries vs full source code

scoring_rubric.2: Partially relevant but mostly incorrect or missing key information
scoring_rubric.3: Correct direction but incomplete or contains notable inaccuracies
scoring_rubric.4: Mostly correct and complete, minor gaps or imprecisions
scoring_rubric.5: Fully correct, complete, and well-structured answer

categories.name: Code Navigation
categories.description: Tasks requiring locating specific code elements

categories.name: Code Understanding
categories.description: Tasks requiring comprehension of code structure and relationships

categories.name: Code Modification Planning
categories.description: Tasks requiring planning changes to the codebase

task_templates.template: Where is the class `{class_name}` defined? Provide the file path and package.

task_templates.expected_info: list of implementing classes with file locations

task_templates.template: List all public methods of class `{class_name}`.
What are the constructor dependencies of `{class_name}`?
Explain the data flow from {source} to {destination} in this module.
task_templates.expected_info: sequence of classes/functions involved in data flow

task_templates.template: What design patterns are used in this module? List them with the classes involved.
Based on its signature and context, what does the function `{function_name}` in `{class_name}` do?
task_templates.expected_info: inferred purpose based on name, params, return type

task_templates.template: Identify the architectural layers in this module and the key classes in each layer.
task_templates.expected_info: layers (UI, domain, data) + classes per layer

task_templates.template: Which files need to change to add a new {feature_type} for `{entity_name}`?
Where should I add a new repository class for `{entity_name}`?
What would break if I rename `{class_name}` to `{new_name}`?
Plan the implementation of {feature_description}. Which classes and files are involved?
task_templates.expected_info: implementation plan with files and classes

task_templates.template: Identify where to add error handling for network calls in this module.
task_templates.expected_info: specific classes/methods that need error handling
